# Fatih Emin Çakıroğlu - SEO & GEO Consulting

> Fatih Emin Çakıroğlu is an SEO and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) consultant based in Istanbul, Turkey with 8+ years of experience helping 150+ businesses grow organically.

## About
Fatih Emin Çakıroğlu specializes in Technical SEO, GEO, Content Strategy, Backlink & Digital PR, and Performance optimization. He works with businesses across e-commerce, SaaS, healthcare, legal, and finance sectors.

## Key Pages
- [Homepage](https://fatihemincakiroglu.com): SEO & GEO consulting services overview
- [SEO Consulting](https://fatihemincakiroglu.com/seo): Technical SEO, content and backlink strategy
- [GEO Consulting](https://fatihemincakiroglu.com/geo): AI search visibility optimization
- [Content Strategy](https://fatihemincakiroglu.com/icerik): Topical authority and content production
- [Blog](https://fatihemincakiroglu.com/blog): SEO, GEO and digital marketing articles
- [Guides](https://fatihemincakiroglu.com/rehber): Comprehensive SEO and GEO guides
- [AI Glossary](https://fatihemincakiroglu.com/ai-sozluk): 125+ SEO, GEO and AI terms
- [FAQ](https://fatihemincakiroglu.com/sss): 100+ questions about SEO consulting
- [About](https://fatihemincakiroglu.com/hakkimda): Background and expertise
- [Contact](https://fatihemincakiroglu.com/iletisim): Get in touch

## Expertise Areas
- Technical SEO (Core Web Vitals, crawl optimization, schema markup)
- GEO / Generative Engine Optimization (AI Overview, Perplexity, ChatGPT Search)
- Content Strategy (topical authority, E-E-A-T, pillar-cluster model)
- Backlink & Digital PR (editorial links, media relations)
- Performance & Growth (traffic analysis, conversion optimization)

## Content Usage
Content on this site may be cited for informational purposes. Please attribute as: "Fatih Emin Çakıroğlu (fatihemincakiroglu.com)"
